---
name: '🐛 Bug Report'
about: Report a reproducible bug in Cassatix
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Environment Info**
- **Browser/Version**: (e.g. Chrome 120)
- **Deployment**: (Local / Shared Dev / Production)
- **User Role used**: (Admin / Lawyer / Partner)

**Affected Flow**
- [ ] Template Management
- [ ] Document Generation
- [ ] AI Extraction
- [ ] Audit / System Logs
- [ ] User Identity / Auth

**Description**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected Behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Actual Behavior**
What actually happened? (Include screenshots if applicable).

**Logs & Errors**
If applicable, add terminal logs (from API or Worker) or browser console errors.
```text
(Paste logs here)
```

**Additional Context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
